description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperLeather straps over the forefoot and back heel to lock the foot in placeCriss crossing straps across the midfootClick lock closure for ankle straps to offer a customised FitSuede footbed with Curved toward the toe for protection of the footOutsoleTPR outsole with circular nubs and lugs Sandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
